Torqued Bolts per Unit

Breakers per Unit Max

Work History
EXPERIENCE
Electronic Power Design (EPD)
Dec 2024 — Present
Electrical Assembly Technician · Houston, TX
Electrical AssemblyPower DistributionWiring & RoutingPre-EnergizationQA/QC
  • Assembled and wired industrial power distribution panels for critical infrastructure systems, maintaining build quality and installation consistency from initial routing to final sign-off.
  • Interpreted electrical drawings and one-line diagrams to route, label, and verify power and control wiring, helping reduce discrepancies prior to inspection.
  • Executed pre-energization checks and visual QC of wiring, labeling, and component placement at each stage; installed CTs, PTs, relays, power meters, and SPDs per specifications.
  • Trained and onboarded new assemblers in wiring sequence and routing standards, improving team-wide build consistency.
W-Industries / Volta LLC
2022 — 2024
Industrial Assembler | QA/QC Technician · Houston, TX
Structural AssemblyTorque VerificationBusbar InstallQC ChecklistsBreaker Alignment
  • Assembled structural frameworks for large-scale power distribution equipment across 200+ verified units, maintaining specification compliance and release readiness at each stage.
  • Verified 80,000+ torqued bolts and 600,000+ screws, nuts, and washers — documenting fastening sequence, installation accuracy, and component layout on every unit.
  • Developed and executed QC checklists to standardize completion criteria; identified and escalated assembly discrepancies before release, helping prevent downstream quality escapes.
  • Installed copper busbars, structural supports, and hardware per engineering drawings; aligned up to 18 breakers per unit with full readiness sign-off.
